M2440_NH_PERMANENT M2440 (M0900) Nursing Home Reason- Permanent Placement This field indicates the reason the patient was admitted to a nursing home was for permanent placement. 0 = Not Checked, 1 = Checked CHAR 1 x
M2440_NH_RESPITE M2440 (M0900) Nursing Home Reason- Respite Care This field indicates the reason the patient was admitted to a nursing home was for respite care. 0 = Not Checked, 1 = Checked CHAR 1 x
